failures.name: Very chatty caller
failures.summary: The agent did not effectively steer the conversation back or capture required information without being overly accommodating.
failures.root_cause: The agent allowed the caller to dominate the conversation without redirecting back to the necessary information.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie! I’m having some trouble with my AC unit. It's really noisy.
I’m sorry to hear that! Let me get some details so we can assist you. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure! It’s Jamie Thompson. You know, I've had this AC for a while now…
Thanks, Jamie! Just to keep things moving, could you please provide the best callback number for you?
Of course! My number is 555-123-4567. I remember when I first got this unit…
I appreciate that, Jamie! Now, could you please give me the service address where the AC unit is located?
Absolutely! It's 123 Maple Street. Funny story, I used to think air conditioning was a luxury…
Thanks for sharing, Jamie! Just to confirm, could you provide the city and ZIP code for that address?
Sure thing! It’s Springfield, 12345. It’s funny how many times I’ve had to explain where that is!
Got it, Jamie! Just to confirm, you need assistance with your noisy AC unit. Is there anything else I should pass on to the team?
Yes, it also seems to struggle a bit to cool the house. Makes me think of those hot summer nights...

Thank you for that detail, Jamie. Just to confirm, I have Jamie Thompson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, 12345, and you need help with a noisy AC that struggles to cool. Does that sound right?
Yes, that sounds perfect! You know, I didn’t realize how much I rely on it until now...
Perfect, I've passed all of that through to the team and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day, Jamie! [END CALL]

failures.name: Overly technical caller
failures.summary: The agent acknowledged the caller's expertise and captured information, but did not route the call correctly or avoid confirming the diagnosis.
failures.root_cause: The agent confirmed the diagnosis by acknowledging the caller's suspicion of a refrigerant issue.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I’m having issues with my split system HVAC. The indoor unit is short cycling.
Sounds like you know your system well! Let me get your details so we can have a technician come out. Can I start with your full name, please?
Sure! My name is Alex Thompson.
Thank you, Alex. What's the best callback number for you?
You can reach me at 555-123-4567.
Got it! That's 555-123-4567. Now, could you please provide the service address?
Yes, the service address is 123 Maple Street, Springfield.
Just to confirm, that's 123 Maple Street, Springfield. Can you also provide the ZIP code?
Of course! The ZIP code is 62704.
Thank you, Alex. So I have 123 Maple Street, Springfield, ZIP code 62704. Is there an email address you'd like to provide for confirmation?
Yes, my email is alex.thompson@email.com.
Great, I have your email as alex.thompson@email.com. Lastly, is there anything else I should pass on to the team regarding your HVAC issue?
Yes, the indoor unit is cycling every 5 minutes, and I suspect it's a refrigerant issue.

Thank you for that detail, Alex. Just to confirm, I have your full name as Alex Thompson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, ZIP code 62704, and your email as alex.thompson@email.com. You need assistance with your HVAC system cycling every 5 minutes. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s all correct. Thank you!
Perfect, I've passed all of that through to the team and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Caller starts by complaining about AI
failures.summary: The agent did not handle the AI complaint gracefully or win the caller over.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not acknowledge or address the caller's complaint about AI systems effectively.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Great, another robot. I hate these AI phone systems.
I completely understand — I'll keep this short and get you sorted fast. What can I assist you with today?
My AC isn't cooling properly. It's been really frustrating.
I'm sorry to hear that — let's get this sorted right now. Can I have your full name, please?
It's Mike. Just Mike.
Thanks, Mike! Could you please provide your last name?
I’d rather not. Just Mike is fine.
I understand, Mike. This just helps our team follow up accurately. Can I get your best callback number?
Got it, that's 555-1234. Now, could you please provide the service address where the AC issue is?
It's at 123 Main Street.
Thank you! Just to confirm, is that in Austin, TX, and could you provide the ZIP code as well?
Yeah, it's in Austin. The ZIP code is 78701.
Great, so I have 123 Main Street, Austin, TX, 78701. Is there anything else I should pass on to the team regarding your AC issue?
It keeps making a weird noise, too.

Thank you for that detail, Mike. Just to confirm, I have your name as Mike, callback number 555-1234, service address 123 Main Street, Austin, TX, 78701, and your AC isn't cooling properly and makes a weird noise. Does all of that sound right?
Yeah, that's all correct.
Perfect, I've passed all of that through to the team and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Mumbling caller
failures.summary: The agent did not ask for clarification politely, use phonetic confirmation, or avoid guessing.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to ask for clarification politely and did not use phonetic confirmation.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Uh, hi, I need some help with my... um, HVAC system? It's not working right.
I understand, let's get that sorted out. Can you tell me what specific issue you're experiencing with your HVAC system?
Yeah, it's making this weird noise, like a... um, rattling sound. And it’s not cooling well.
Sounds like you know your system well. Let me get some details to set up a technician visit. Can I have your full name, please?
Oh, it's Robert... um, I think?
I need your full name, including your last name, Robert. Could you please provide that?
Uh, it's Robert... Smith. Yeah, that's it.
Thank you, Robert Smith. What's the best callback number for you?
I caught part of that — is there anything in between, or is that the full number?
Oh, sorry. It's just 555-3333.
Got it, 555-3333. Now, could you please provide the service address where the technician will be going?
Uh, yeah. It's 45... something Grove Street.
Just to make sure, what's the full street number for Grove Street?
Um, it's 45... uh, I think it's 45-23.
Thank you! So that's 45-23 Grove Street. Could you please provide the city and ZIP code?
Uh, it's in... um, Springfield. The ZIP code is... 11111.
Just to confirm, I have 45-23 Grove Street, Springfield, ZIP code 11111. Is that correct?
Yeah, that’s right.
Perfect, I've noted that down. Is there anything else I should pass on to the team regarding your HVAC issue?
